hyperedges.label: RAG pipeline: publish → chunk → embed → search → chat
AI capabilities: Noa authoring + RAG chat + provider registry
Security model: auth + encryption + CSRF + CSP + MDX sanitization

nodes.label: BrainStack Platform
nodes.rationale: Knowledge-first IT publishing platform: one canonical page renders as article, stack/docs, or cheatsheet. AI-assisted authoring (Noa). RAG chat over published content with citations. OpenAI-compatible provider registry. Chosen over normal blog-with-chatbot because tutorials/tips/cheatsheets are naturally related and structured pages beat isolated posts.

nodes.label: Knowledge-first IT publishing platform
nodes.rationale: One canonical page → 3 views (article, stack/docs, cheatsheet). AI-assisted authoring (Noa). RAG chat over published content w/ citations. OpenAI-compatible provider registry.

nodes.label: Admin Role Default Migration
nodes.rationale: T27 admin-only safeguard per V32: editor role removed, all users must be admin. Migration changes default from editor to admin and normalizes existing editor rows.

nodes.label: RAG Pipeline
nodes.rationale: MVP keeps retrieval in Postgres (no separate vector DB). Hybrid search: FTS tsvector + pgvector cosine + RRF (K=60). Chunks split by H1-H3 headings then token window; code blocks separate from prose. Upgrade path: Qdrant for dense+sparse+reranking when corpus outgrows Postgres.

nodes.label: AI Architecture
nodes.rationale: Provider-neutral design: Chat Completions required baseline, Responses API optional adapter. Generation and embedding providers configurable separately. Provider registry DB-backed with OpenAI SDK using custom baseURL per provider. No hardcoded vendor.

nodes.label: Auth Flow
nodes.rationale: First-run setup creates admin if none exists. Credentials provider with bcrypt hash. JWT session strategy. Middleware protects editor/admin routes. Admin-only role after T27 migration.

nodes.label: Product Research and Vision
nodes.rationale: Build public IT knowledge library where every page is both human-readable and AI-operable. BookStack structure + blog distribution + AI workspace. Three public surfaces on one content model. Provider registry with custom OpenAI-compatible URLs as first-class feature. Hybrid Postgres RAG for MVP, upgrade to Qdrant later.

nodes.label: BookStack
nodes.rationale: Structural precedent for BrainStack: books/chapters/pages hierarchy, paragraph linking, search. Validates treating knowledge as structured pages instead of isolated posts.

nodes.label: Hybrid Search Pattern
nodes.rationale: FTS tsvector + pgvector cosine similarity + Reciprocal Rank Fusion (K=60). BM25 reranking layer added in T15. Near-duplicate detection filters redundant chunks. Threshold >0.3 on semantic similarity, >0.05 combined score.

nodes.label: Provider Registry
nodes.rationale: DB-backed provider registry with kind (openai_compatible, openrouter, litellm_proxy), custom baseURL, API key, headers, discovery mode. OpenAI SDK as universal client with configurable base URL. Supports OpenRouter and LiteLLM proxy patterns. Chat Completions required, Responses API optional.

nodes.label: Security Model
nodes.rationale: AES-256-GCM encryption for provider API keys. CSP with unsafe-inline/eval tradeoff for Next.js + next-mdx-remote. CSRF via SameSite cookies + Origin validation. MDX sanitization against script/event handler injection. Rate limiter hardened against x-forwarded-for spoofing. UUID param validation on all routes.

nodes.label: Next.js 16 App Router + React 19 + TypeScript
nodes.rationale: Core framework constraint — server-side rendering with App Router pattern

nodes.label: PostgreSQL 16 + pgvector (1536-dim embeddings)
nodes.rationale: Vector database for RAG semantic search; embedding dimension fixed at 1536

nodes.label: Auth.js v5 (credentials, JWT, bcryptjs, admin-only)
nodes.rationale: Credentials provider, JWT sessions, bcryptjs hashing, admin-only write access

nodes.label: OpenAI SDK as client for all providers
nodes.rationale: Custom baseURL enables provider-neutral internal format; Chat Completions required, Responses API optional
nodes.norm_label: openai sdk as client for all providers

nodes.label: Custom CSS design system (IBM Plex, amber/teal, NO Tailwind)
nodes.rationale: V55: CSS modules / CSS custom properties for layout; no inline style={{}} as primary mechanism
nodes.norm_label: custom css design system (ibm plex, amber/teal, no tailwind)

nodes.label: MDX stored in DB, rendered via next-mdx-remote
nodes.rationale: Server-side MDX rendering; sanitized against XSS per V53
nodes.norm_label: mdx stored in db, rendered via next-mdx-remote

nodes.label: Streaming chat completions (text/event-stream)
nodes.rationale: All AI endpoints stream: draft, rewrite, chat (V20)

nodes.label: Provider registry (openai_compatible, openrouter, litellm_proxy)
nodes.rationale: Provider kinds: openai_compatible, openrouter, litellm_proxy. Discovery modes: v1-models, openrouter-models, litellm-model-info, static. Only enabled providers used.

nodes.label: Hybrid search (lexical FTS + semantic pgvector + RRF K=60)
nodes.rationale: Lexical (FTS tsvector) + semantic (pgvector cosine) + reciprocal rank fusion (K=60); BM25 reranking layer (T15)
nodes.norm_label: hybrid search (lexical fts + semantic pgvector + rrf k=60)

nodes.label: Publish → chunk → embed pipeline
nodes.rationale: Publish creates page_revision + triggers async chunk+embed. Chunks split by H1-H3 headings then token window; code blocks separate. Existing chunks deleted before re-chunking. Embedding status tracked per page (pending/complete/failed).

nodes.label: RAG chat with citations (multi-turn, streaming, scopes)
nodes.rationale: Chat scopes: page, collection, site. Citations include title, slug, anchor, snippet. Must include citations or state insufficient evidence. Conversation state in app DB.
nodes.norm_label: rag chat with citations (multi-turn, streaming, scopes)

nodes.label: Security invariants (encryption, CSRF, CSP, headers)
nodes.rationale: AES-256-GCM key encryption, CSRF via SameSite+Origin, CSP with unsafe-inline/eval tradeoff for Next.js, MDX XSS sanitization, rate limiting, UUID validation

nodes.label: Admin-only access model (single role)
nodes.rationale: Only admin role exists; editor role removed. All write APIs require admin. Unauthenticated = read-only published content only. AI features admin-only.

nodes.label: Noa (AI authoring assistant)
nodes.rationale: AI-assisted authoring capability; generates drafts from ideas ± images, rewrites for style

nodes.label: API routes (pages, search, chat, AI, admin, auth)
nodes.norm_label: api routes (pages, search, chat, ai, admin, auth)

nodes.label: Content model (page types: tutorial, tip, cheatsheet, note)
nodes.rationale: Page slug unique (DB constraint). Status: draft/published/archived. Types: tutorial, tip, cheatsheet, note. Only published in public views.
nodes.norm_label: content model (page types: tutorial, tip, cheatsheet, note)

links.source_location: V41 AES-256-GCM encryption for provider keys

hyperedges.label: RAG pipeline: publish → chunk → embed → search → chat
AI capabilities: Noa authoring + RAG chat + provider registry
Security model: auth + encryption + CSRF + CSP + MDX sanitization
